name: html2rss-web
short_desc: Self-hosted RSS feed generator from websites
author: gildesmarais
description: html2rss-web serves RSS/JSON feeds from website sources using a Ruby (Roda) backend and a Preact frontend. It converts arbitrary websites into RSS 2.0 feeds and provides a web UI for creating and managing feed URLs. Supports signed, per-account feed URLs and multiple extraction strategies.

form_fields.label: Secret Key
form_fields.hint: Secret key used for signing feed URLs (min 32 chars). Auto-generated.

form_fields.label: Health Check Token
form_fields.hint: Optional token to protect the /api/v1/health endpoint

form_fields.label: Enable Auto Source
form_fields.hint: Allow feed creation via POST /api/v1/feeds (requires authentication token)
